hero.subtitle: Your Digital Campaign Archive for Pen & Paper

features.title: What Lorehub Offers
features.sub: Everything you need for an unforgettable campaign — in one place.
features.card1Desc: Manage NPCs, organisations, player characters and locations with detailed profiles, images, status and private notes — visible only to the DM.
features.card2Desc: Link characters to places, assign NPCs to organisations, and tag any object with @-mentions. See the whole picture at a glance.
features.card3Desc: Players keep personal journals, the DM writes the official campaign history. Entries can be linked to NPCs, locations and organisations.
features.card4Desc: Create multiple campaigns and invite your team. Each campaign has its own space with its own data, players and Dungeon Masters.

how.title: How Lorehub Works
how.sub: Three steps to a living, shared world.
how.step1Title: Create a campaign & invite your team
how.step1Text: Create a new campaign and invite your players via invite link. Each person gets their role — Dungeon Master or Player.
how.step2Text: Create NPCs, locations, organisations and characters. Link them together, add images and backstories — the world takes shape.
how.step3Text: Players keep their journal after each session, the DM adds to the official history. Everything stays findable via full-text search — including @-mentions.

roles.title: For Dungeon Masters & Players
roles.dm1: Manage hundreds of NPCs with status, race and private notes
roles.dm2: Build your world with locations, regions and organisations
roles.dm3: Write the official history of the campaign
roles.dm4: Keep private DM notes — invisible to players
roles.dm5: Full-text search across all objects, entries and @-mentions
roles.player1: Keep a personal journal of your adventures
roles.player2: Manage your character with image and backstory
roles.player3: Explore the world — NPCs, locations and organisations
roles.player4: Link journal entries to people and places
roles.player5: Stay on top of all campaign events

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Lorehub is a digital campaign archive for tabletop roleplaying games like Dungeons & Dragons. It helps Dungeon Masters and players manage their campaign world — with NPCs, locations, organisations, characters, a journal system and more.
faq.q2: Which roleplaying games is Lorehub suitable for?
faq.a2: Lorehub is system-agnostic and works with any tabletop RPG: D&D 5e, Pathfinder, Das Schwarze Auge, Shadowrun, Vampire: The Masquerade and many more.
faq.q3: Can players and the DM use Lorehub at the same time?
faq.a3: Yes. The Dungeon Master manages the world and writes the official history. Players keep their own journals and can maintain their character. Private DM notes remain invisible to players.
faq.a4: In journal entries, notes and descriptions, you can link any object using @Name — NPCs, locations, organisations or characters. These connections are searchable and displayed as clickable links.
faq.a5: Yes. You can create as many campaigns as you like. Each campaign has its own space with its own team, NPCs, locations and the complete journal.
faq.a6: Registration is free. You can start immediately and create your first campaign.

cta.title: Ready to write your story?
